arts.ttl: Frank Lampard takes on friend and former team-mate Scott Parker in Championship match of the weekend - as Coventry prepare to honour 50 club legends
arts.sum: Frank Lampard was alongside Parker when The Clarets manager made his debuts for Chelsea and England, and he's not surprised his lunchtime rival went into management.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker discusses decisive factor that will split promotion rivals Burnley, Sheffield United and Leeds United
arts.sum: Burnley’s “consistency of behaviours” could well prove to be the decisive factor in their battle for automatic promotion.

arts.sum: Details have now been confirmed for the end of the regular 2024/25 EFL season and the schedule for the Sky Bet EFL Play-Offs, with 12 fixtures set to take place across a highly anticipated nine-day period in the Championship, League One and League Two. arts.ttl: Frank Lampard addresses summer transfer question in wake of Oliver Dovin injury
arts.sum: That leaves Brad Collins and Ben Wilson to compete to take his place for the remainder of the Sky Blues season, while rookie stopper Luke Bell has been recalled from his loan spell at Gloucester City to add a third keeper to the squad at a time when fellow development goalie Cian Tyler is injured. The long-term injury to first choice Oliver Dovin begs the question as to whether Coventry City will be looking to recruit a new goalkeeper this summer.

arts.ttl: 'Easy to be forgotten about': Burnley's Aaron Ramsey reflects on his 13-month injury nightmare
arts.sum: It’s been a long, long road back for Aaron Ramsey.

arts.ttl: Coventry City v Burnley: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets push for top two
arts.sum: Burnley take their promotion charge to Coventry City today looking to claim another big three points.

arts.ttl: Coventry City payday edges closer as Viktor Gyokeres 'commences talks' ahead of transfer window
arts.sum: And while that will come as a major boost for all of the Sweden international’s admirers – the likes of Arsenal and Manchester United will be relieved to hear the figure is substantially less than his reported £83.6m release clause – it’s not such great news for Coventry, who have a 10 percent sell-on clause and are set to gain financially from any profit on the initial fee they sold the 26-year-old for back in the summer of 2023 (around £20m including bonuses).
